backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing video clip management with authorization, user profiles, clip CRUD operations, similarity scoring, trending analytics, and AI-generated clip suggestions using Map-based storage and access control.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of frontend components, hooks, and configuration files describing the React application structure with authentication, video playback, clip management, and admin features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and component styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, 'Beast Clipping' title, and root div mounting the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router setup, managing video playback state, clip selection, AI suggestions, and routing between home page and admin panel with authentication-based access control.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays admin panel errors with retry functionality and navigation back to home.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component displaying system statistics, user principal ID with copy functionality, total clips count, and trending analytics table with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a single video clip as a card with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components, with loading and empty states.
Shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with viral scores and action buttons to use suggested timestamps.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating clips with title input and start/end timestamp controls, supporting both manual entry and suggested values from selections.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header containing branding, authentication button, and conditional admin panel link for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and AI clip generation trigger functionality.
Badge component displaying viral potential scores with color-coded styling and icons based on score thresholds (high/medium/low).
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: React component that renders a responsive YouTube video player embedded in a Card using an iframe with a 16:9 aspect ratio.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating it with Internet Identity authentication and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend actor using React Query.
Hook that provides auto-generation of clip suggestions with viral scores, currently using mock AI data but designed to integrate with real AI services in the future. Includes mutation to call backend's generateClipsAutomatically method.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Hook that handles clip creation with a mutation to save clips to the backend, calculating viral scores based on duration (15-60s optimal) and title characteristics including viral keywords.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Hook that fetches all video clips and provides a delete mutation with loading state tracking for individual clip deletions.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Hook managing clip timestamp state (start/end minutes/seconds), providing validation, formatting, and conversion utilities for time ranges.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive Internet Identity authentication hook and provider that manages login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Hook that checks if the current user is an admin by calling backend's isCallerAdmin method, with extensive debug logging and a 10-second timeout to prevent infinite loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Simple hook that fetches trending clips from the backend actor using React Query.
Hook providing utilities to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns for both youtube.com and youtu.be formats.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a complete design system for light and dark themes including colors for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for a YouTube video clipping application with admin panel, listing completed features, known issues (admin panel permissions and user ID display bugs), and architectural notes about authentication changes.
